name: Oriental Salad with Sesame Vinaigrette Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 small carrot, shredded in long strands
1 small daikon, shredded in long strands
20 oz lychees, drained and cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook soba noodles according to package directions, rinse, drain and cool.
2. In a large bowl, toss noodles with shredded carrot and daikon.
3. Place lettuce on a serving platter.
4. Top the lettuce with the noodle mixture, peppers, tofu, water chestnuts, mandarin oranges, and lychees.
5. Chill until ready to serve.
6. To make dressing, combine remaining ingredients; mix well.
7. Serve salad with dressing. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
